title: maxillaria discolor
intro: Maxillaria discolor, also known as the "Dwarf Pansy Orchid," is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been traditionally used to relieve congestion, reduce fever, and soothe sore throats. Herbal preparations of Maxillaria discolor can be made by infusing the roots in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's extracts in tinctures and capsules to harness its medicinal benefits.
